positive: Minimalist abstract design featuring interlocking geometric shapes forming a stylized coffee cup and steam. Mid-century modern aesthetic, flat design, limited color palette (mustard yellow, navy blue, cream), clean vector lines, symmetrical, simple graphic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gradients, texture, photorealism, organic elements, messy, busy
